description: Style NoteMinimalist styling on a link strap watch from maxima for women, the patterning on the bracelet of this watch is perfect for dressy and casual occasions. Contouring your wrist, this timepiece lends a class to any off-duty ensemble. The new range of watches are a fresh take on the Ssteele eye for perfection and are great for urban wear.  Product DetailsCase style: Stainless steel round case  Dial style: Black dial with silver hands  Strap style: Bracelet style steel strap with a butterfly claspFeatures: Ssteele branding on the 12 hour mark, Maxima branding on the 6 hour mark and screw to reset time   Waterproof to 3 ATM, allowing you to wear it even when showeringWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 18 mm  Case thickness: 5 mm
